commands.go_tests_container: docker run --rm --platform linux/amd64 -v $PWD:/workspace -w /workspace golang:1.25-bookworm sh -lc '/usr/local/go/bin/go test ./...'

notes: Host Go toolchain still reports a mixed-version internal package mismatch (go1.25.4 vs go1.25.7).
Containerized Go 1.25 baseline is clean and should be used as the reproducible pre-performance reference in this environment.
